exploration_notes:
The task targets two mechanisms: (1) series limit enforcement and (2) out-of-bound/out-of-order sample handling in the TSDB head.

**Series limit enforcement**: `tsdb/head.go` defines `SeriesLifecycleCallback` (line 234) with `PreCreation()` — called in `getOrCreateWithOptionalID()` (line 1845) before any new series is added. A non-nil error from `PreCreation` prevents series creation, which is how cardinality/series limits are enforced. The `numSeries` atomic counter (line 70) tracks the active
